form.formComment: Useful type. Last outing finished sixth of 8 runners at Newbury on March 20 over 4100m, 16 len behind Le Frimeur with 73.5kg at $8.50. The run before won by 1.0 len Catterick on February 24 over 3100m defeating Myrighthandman carrying 73kg at $2.60 in a hurdle. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 57 days. Last run favourite; won by 1.3 len Hereford on February 11 over 3200m on heavy going defeating Superkap with 71kg at $1.50 in a hurdle. The run before fell at Windsor on January 18 over 3200m. Hard to fault on her recent run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Useful type. Freshened for 57 days. Hard to fault on her recent run.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last run finished third in a small field at Doncaster on March 13 over 3300m, 4 len behind Count Of Vendome with 72kg at $34. Race before eased back early on finished fourth of 7 runners at Chelmsford on February 8 over 2800m, 9 len behind The Craftymaster carrying 57.5kg at $29. Rates highly in this field and is expected to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Fresh up after five months finished 11th of 18 starters at Wincanton on February 25 over 3000m, 36 len behind Aguellid carrying 73kg at $301. Previously second-up failed to make any headway until the straight; raced back and made ground from the turn; won by 1.5 len Wolverhampton on January 20 2025 over 2400m defeating This Time Maybe carrying 60kg at $5. Looks tested in this line-up and others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran too free and hung right-handed in the back straight.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Wincanton January 15 over 3000m. First ever start ran 5 of 8 runners at Wincanton November 8 over 3000m, 8 len behind No Way Jay carrying 71kg at $23. Sure to make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished seventh of 18 runners at Wincanton on February 25 over 3000m, 18 len behind Aguellid with 73kg at $10. Last start finished second of 12 starters at Huntingdon on March 18 over 3200m, 4.5 len behind Wandering Ego carrying 72kg at $10. Looks ready to break through.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation 3 of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G2 Finesse Juvenile Novices' Hurdle January 24 over 3400m, slow track; 3 len behind Maestro Conti with 70kg at $3. At debut favourite; won by 5 len Fairyhouse November 4 over 3419m defeating Apache Peak carrying 70kg at $11. Well worth another chance.
